judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on a black-and-white portrait photograph of a man labeled 'PEARSON', but Description B adds a hat and newspaper context not mentioned in A, without contradiction.
original_image_tags: Head-and-shoulders black-and-white photograph of Drew Pearson wearing a suit and tie. Caption below photo reads "PEARSON".
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned newspaper clipping collage mounted on a document page, with the headline “Reports Plentiful, ‘Saucers’ Nix” and a small portrait photograph of a man labeled “PEARSON”; handwritten blue and black notations, check marks, and a right-hand list of newspaper titles with date stamps “8 DEC 19 1950” and “NOV 25 1950.”*
